columns.name: AADGroupId
columns.description: Azure Active Directory group id

columns.name: AADTarget
columns.description: The user that the action (identified by the Operation property) was performed on

columns.name: Activity
columns.description: The activity that the user performed.

columns.name: Actor
columns.description: The user or service principal that performed the action

columns.name: ActorContextId
columns.description: The GUID of the organization that the actor belongs to

columns.name: ActorIpAddress
columns.description: The actor's IP address in IPV4 or IPV6 address format

columns.name: AddOnGuid
columns.description: The unique identifier of the add-on generated this event

columns.name: AddonName
columns.description: The name of the add-on that generated this event

columns.name: AddOnType
columns.description: The type of add-on that generated this event

columns.name: AffectedItems
columns.description: Information about each item in the group

columns.name: AppAccessContext
columns.description: The application context for the user or service principal that performed the action.

columns.name: AppDistributionMode
columns.description: Application distribution mode

columns.name: AppId
columns.description: Application ID

columns.name: Application
columns.description: The application name

columns.name: ApplicationId
columns.description: SharePoint application ID

columns.name: AppPoolName
columns.description: The App pool name

columns.name: ArtifactsShared
columns.description: The artifacts shared in the meeting.

columns.name: Attendees
columns.description: The list of attendees for the meeting.

columns.name: AzureActiveDirectory_EventType
columns.description: The type of Azure AD event

columns.name: AzureADAppId
columns.description: Teams Application Azure AD ID

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: ChannelGuid
columns.description: A unique identifier for the channel being audited

columns.name: ChannelName
columns.description: The name of the channel being audited

columns.name: ChannelType
columns.description: The type of channel being audited (Standard/Private)

columns.name: ChatName
columns.description: The name of the chat

columns.name: ChatThreadId
columns.description: The Id of the chat thread

columns.name: Client
columns.description: Details about the client device, device OS, and device browser that was used for the of the account login event

columns.name: Client_IPAddress
columns.description: The IP address of the device that was used when the operation was logged

columns.name: ClientAppId
columns.description: Client application ID

columns.name: ClientInfoString
columns.description: Information about the email client that was used to perform the operation

columns.name: ClientIP
columns.description: The IP address of the device that was used when the activity was logged

columns.name: ClientMachineName
columns.description: The machine name that hosts the Outlook client

columns.name: ClientProcessName
columns.description: The email client that was used to access the mailbox

columns.name: ClientVersion
columns.description: The version of the email client

columns.name: CommunicationType
columns.description: The type of communications that was conducted

columns.name: CrossMailboxOperations
columns.description: Indicates if the operation involved more than one mailbox

columns.name: CustomEvent
columns.description: Optional string for custom events

columns.name: DataCenterSecurityEventType
columns.description: The type of dmdlet event in lock box

columns.name: DestFolder
columns.description: The destination folder

columns.name: DestinationFileExtension
columns.description: The file extension of a file that is copied or moved

columns.name: DestinationFileName
columns.description: The name of the file that is copied or moved

columns.name: DestinationRelativeUrl
columns.description: The URL of the destination folder where a file is copied or moved

columns.name: DestMailboxId
columns.description: Set only if the CrossMailboxOperations parameter is True

columns.name: DestMailboxOwnerMasterAccountSid
columns.description: Set only if the CrossMailboxOperations parameter is True

columns.name: DestMailboxOwnerSid
columns.description: Set only if the CrossMailboxOperations parameter is True

columns.name: DestMailboxOwnerUPN
columns.description: Set only if the CrossMailboxOperations parameter is True

columns.name: DeviceInformation
columns.description: The user device information.

columns.name: EffectiveOrganization
columns.description: The name of the tenant that the elevation/cmdlet was targeted at

columns.name: ElevationApprovedTime
columns.description: The timestamp for when the elevation was approved

columns.name: ElevationApprover
columns.description: The name of a Microsoft manager

columns.name: ElevationDuration
columns.description: The duration for which the elevation was active (in Hours)

columns.name: ElevationRequestId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the elevation request

columns.name: ElevationRole
columns.description: The role the elevation was requested for

columns.name: ElevationTime
columns.description: The start time of the elevation

columns.name: Event_Data
columns.description: Optional payload for custom events

columns.name: EventSource
columns.description: Identifies that an event occurred in SharePoint. Possible values are SharePoint or ObjectModel

columns.name: ExtendedProperties
columns.description: The extended properties of the Azure AD event

columns.name: ExternalAccess
columns.description: Specifies whether the cmdlet was run by a user in your organization

columns.name: ExtraProperties
columns.description: A list of extra properties

columns.name: Folder
columns.description: The folder where a group of items is located

columns.name: Folders
columns.description: Information about the source folders involved in an operation

columns.name: GenericInfo
columns.description: Used for comments and other generic information

columns.name: InternalLogonType
columns.description: Reserved for internal use

columns.name: InterSystemsId
columns.description: The GUID that track the actions across components within the Office 365 service

columns.name: IntraSystemId
columns.description: The GUID that's generated by Azure Active Directory to track the action

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: IsJoinedFromLobby
columns.description: Indicates whether the user join from the lobby.

columns.name: IsManagedDevice
columns.description: Indicates if operation was created by a device managed by the organization

columns.name: Item
columns.description: Represents the item upon which the operation was performed

columns.name: ItemName
columns.description: The string in the Subject field of the email message

columns.name: ItemType
columns.description: The type of object that was accessed or modified. See the ItemType table for details on the types of objects

columns.name: JoinTime
columns.description: The time the user joined the meeting.

columns.name: LeaveTime
columns.description: The time the user left the meeting.

columns.name: ListItemUniqueId
columns.description: The Guid of uniquely an identifiable item of list. This information is present only if it is applicable.

columns.name: LoginStatus
columns.description: This property is from OrgIdLogon.LoginStatus directly. The mapping of various interesting logon failures could be done by alerting algorithms

columns.name: Logon_Type
columns.description: Indicates the type of user who accessed the mailbox and performed the operation that was logged

columns.name: LogonUserDisplayName
columns.description: The user-friendly name of the user who performed the operation

columns.name: LogonUserSid
columns.description: The SID of the user who performed the operation

columns.name: MachineDomainInfo
columns.description: Information about device sync operations

columns.name: MachineId
columns.description: Information about device sync operations

columns.name: MailboxGuid
columns.description: The Exchange GUID of the mailbox that was accessed

columns.name: MailboxOwnerMasterAccountSid
columns.description: Mailbox owner account's master account SID

columns.name: MailboxOwnerSid
columns.description: The SID of the mailbox owner

columns.name: MailboxOwnerUPN
columns.description: The email address of the person who owns the mailbox that was accessed

columns.name: MeetingDetailId
columns.description: The meeting detail ID.

columns.name: Members
columns.description: A list of users within a Team

columns.name: MessageId
columns.description: An identifier for a chat or channel message

columns.name: ModifiedObjectResolvedName
columns.description: This is the user friendly name of the object that was modified by the cmdlet

columns.name: ModifiedProperties
columns.description: The property is included for admin events, such as adding a user as a member of a site or a site collection admin group

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Only present for settings events. Name of the setting that changed

columns.name: NewValue
columns.description: Only present for settings events. New value of the setting

columns.name: OfficeId
columns.description: Unique identifier of an audit record

columns.name: OfficeObjectId
columns.description: For SharePoint and OneDrive for Business activity

columns.name: OfficeTenantId
columns.description: The office tenant id

columns.name: OfficeWorkload
columns.description: The Office 365 service where the activity occurred

columns.name: OldValue
columns.description: Only present for settings events. Old value of the setting

columns.name: Operation
columns.description: The name of the operation that the user is performing

columns.name: OperationProperties
columns.description: Additional operation properties

columns.name: OperationScope
columns.description: The scope the operation was performed on

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The GUID for your organization's Office 365 tenant. This value will always be the same for your organization

columns.name: OrganizationName
columns.description: The name of the tenant

columns.name: OriginatingServer
columns.description: The name of the server from which the cmdlet was executed

columns.name: Parameters
columns.description: The name and value for all parameters that were used with the cmdlet that is identified in the Operations property

columns.name: RecordType
columns.description: The type of operation indicated by the record. See the AuditLogRecordType table for details on the types of audit log records

columns.name: _ResourceId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the resource that the record is associated with

columns.name: ResultReasonType
columns.description: Reason for the result reported in ResultType

columns.name: ResultStatus
columns.description: Indicates whether the action (specified in the Operation property) was successful or not

columns.name: SendAsUserMailboxGuid
columns.description: The Exchange GUID of the mailbox that was accessed to send email as

columns.name: SendAsUserSmtp
columns.description: SMTP address of the user who is being impersonated

columns.name: SendonBehalfOfUserMailboxGuid
columns.description: The Exchange GUID of the mailbox that was accessed to send mail on behalf of

columns.name: SendOnBehalfOfUserSmtp
columns.description: SMTP address of the user on whose behalf the email is sent

columns.name: SensitivityLabelId
columns.description: The current sensitivity label ID of the file.

columns.name: SharingType
columns.description: The type of sharing permissions that were assigned to the user that the resource was shared with. This user is identified by the UserSharedWith parameter

columns.name: Site_
columns.description: The GUID of the site where the file or folder accessed by the user is located

columns.name: Site_Url
columns.description: The URL of the site where the file or folder accessed by the user is located

columns.name: Source_Name
columns.description: The entity that triggered the audited operation. Possible values are SharePoint or ObjectModel

columns.name: SourceFileExtension
columns.description: The file extension of the file that was accessed by the user

columns.name: SourceFileName
columns.description: The name of the file or folder accessed by the user

columns.name: SourceRecordId
columns.description: Unique identifier of an audit record

columns.name: SourceRelativeUrl
columns.description: The URL of the folder that contains the file accessed by the user

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SRPolicyId
columns.description: Policy ID

columns.name: SRPolicyName
columns.description: Policy name

columns.name: SRRuleMatchDetails
columns.description: Rule details

columns.name: Start_Time
columns.description: The date and time at which the cmdlet was executed

columns.name: _SubscriptionId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the subscription that the record is associated with

columns.name: SupportTicketId
columns.description: The customer support ticket ID for the action in 'act-on-behalf-of' situations

columns.name: TabType
columns.description: The type of tab that generated this event

columns.name: TargetContextId
columns.description: The GUID of the organization that the targeted user belongs to

columns.name: TargetUserId
columns.description: Target user id

columns.name: TargetUserOrGroupName
columns.description: Stores the UPN or name of the target user or group that a resource was shared with

columns.name: TargetUserOrGroupType
columns.description: Identifies whether the target user or group is a Member, Guest, Group, or Partner

columns.name: TeamGuid
columns.description: A unique identifier for the team being audited

columns.name: TeamName
columns.description: The name of the team being audited

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The date and time in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) when the user performed the activity

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UniqueSharingId
columns.description: The unique sharing ID associated with the sharing operation.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: The user agent

columns.name: UserDomain
columns.description: The domain of the user

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: The UPN (User Principal Name) of the user who performed the action (specified in the Operation property) that resulted in the record being logged

columns.name: UserKey
columns.description: An alternative ID for the user identified in the UserId property

columns.name: UserSharedWith
columns.description: The user that a resource was shared with

columns.name: UserType
columns.description: The type of user that performed the operation. See the UserType table for details on the types of users
